source: plan/bearings.md § Group-buy hero art — colorful SVGs
template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject
subject: Six CYL-profile keycaps with one focal muted-teal cap surfaced with a wave-line motif
prompt: Match the visual rhythm of the hero-art GMK CYL siblings (gmk-cyl-prussian-alert.svg in particular) — 2px warm-grey stroke, single-color splash, soft elliptical wash behind the cap cluster. Layout: 6 CYL-profile keycaps in two staggered rows of three; back-row middle is the focal piece, painted in muted teal (oklch 0.55 0.085 215) per the bearings 'Group-buy hero art' rule locked 2026-05-10 via /oversight. The focal cap also carries a single wave-line motif across its top surface, an ocean-wave curve drawn in warm-grey with a teal echo beneath, nodding to the kit's name 'King of the Seas' and its two-colorway 'Sovereign'/'Mutation' theme. The splash hue is the explicit one-time exception to the 'avoid stock blues' guideline — the kit is literally a deep-ocean keycap set, so a desaturated teal (low chroma 0.085) is allowed where vibrant primary blue would not be. Single-splash convention preserved: only the focal cap, wave motif, and backdrop wash use teal; the other five caps and all structural strokes remain warm-grey. KBDfans group buy, CYL-profile doubleshot ABS.
